summary: Completed testing of team sport persistence bug fix and baseball tracker features. All 7 requested features verified working: team creation/persistence, play-by-play log (no doubling), player names in plays, runner numbers on bases, fielder boxes with team colors, and substitution dialog with offensive/defensive/both options.
critical_code_review_comments: TeamDetail.jsx correctly tracks teamSport state (line 104) and includes it in PUT requests (lines 191-192, 209-210)
Backend PUT /api/teams correctly preserves sport field when incoming default is 'basketball' but existing is different (lines 1424-1430)
BaseballLiveGame.jsx uses addPlay() helper with lastPlayIdRef for deduplication to prevent play-by-play doubling (lines 949-970)
BaseballDiamond component accepts fieldingTeamColor and battingTeamColor props for team-colored fielder boxes (line 424)
seed_data_creation: Created test team: TEST_Baseball_Team_e51ac1 (auto-cleaned by test fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested bug fixes verified working. Team sport persistence fix ensures baseball teams stay in baseball list after editing. Baseball tracker features all functional: play-by-play log uses deduplication, player names shown in all plays, substitution dialog has 3 options (offensive/defensive/both), fielder boxes use team colors, runner indicators show player numbers.

team_creation_persistence.notes: Created baseball team, added roster, saved, navigated back - team visible in baseball teams list. Sport field preserved correctly.

play_by_play_no_doubling.notes: Clicked Ball button 4 times, got exactly 4 entries (Ball 1, Ball 2, Ball 3, Walk). No duplicates. Uses lastPlayIdRef for deduplication.

player_names_in_plays.notes: All plays show player number and name: 'Walk to #2 Ryan Smith', 'Ball 1 - #2 Ryan Smith', etc.

runner_numbers_on_bases.notes: BaseballDiamond component shows runner indicators with player numbers using battingTeamColor. Code verified at lines 455-496.

fielder_boxes_team_colors.notes: Fielder position boxes (LF, CF, RF, SS, 2B, 3B, 1B, P, C) use fieldingTeamColor prop. Visible as red boxes for Riverside Sluggers.

substitution_icon_in_batting_order.notes: Found 9 ArrowLeftRight substitution icons in batting order, one per player.

substitution_dialog_options.notes: Dialog shows 3 options: 'Offensive Only (Batting Order)' green, 'Defensive Only (Field Position)' blue, 'Both (Full Substitution)' purple. Player selection dropdown appears after choosing type.

key_tests: test_create_baseball_team - Creates baseball team, verifies sport='baseball'
test_update_baseball_team_preserves_sport - Updates team with sport field, verifies preserved
test_update_without_sport_preserves_existing - Backend preserves sport when default 'basketball' sent
test_add_roster_to_baseball_team - Adds 9 players, verifies sport preserved
test_full_workflow_create_edit_navigate_back - Full workflow test matching user bug report
